f2p_added: hashes foreign Copilot tool item IDs into a bounded Codex-safe fc_<hash> shape
notes: Pre-flag described 'GOOD — has 4 behavioral F2P gates targeting normalizeToolCallId' but install_config.json had FAIL_TO_PASS=[]. Canonical patch contains exactly ONE new behavioral test (packages/ai/test/openai-responses-foreign-toolcall-id.test.ts) with one `it(...)` block that asserts the foreign Copilot tool-call ID is hashed to a bounded `fc_<hash>` shape, length <=64, matching /^fc_[A-Za-z0-9]+$/. Populated FAIL_TO_PASS with the it() description (parse_log_vitest matches the inner `it` text only). The 4 expectations within that single test (defined, type=function_call, expectedItemId match, length <=64, regex match) all run as a single test name in vitest verbose; falls together. Implementation-agnostic enough — any hash-into-fc_<id> approach passes. Instruction is detailed (~9 lines, names file path, char examples, deterministic+bounded constraint). _fidelity: exact, no warnings.
